User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the iGen application, including their profile details, role, and application-specific settings.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for login and communication.

role.description: The role of the user within the application, determining access privileges.

hasClaimedCredits.description: Indicates whether the user has claimed their initial $300 iGen Cloud Credits.

apiKey.description: The Google Cloud API Key provided by the user to power AI services.

preferredLanguage.description: The user's preferred language for the application UI (e.g., 'VI' for Vietnamese, 'EN' for English).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was last updated.

Feature.title: Feature
Feature.description: Defines an AI feature available in the iGen ecosystem dashboard.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Feature entity.

name.description: The name of the feature (e.g., 'Rendering', 'Video Creator').

description.description: A brief description of what the feature offers.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to a thumbnail image or icon representing the feature in the dashboard.

iconKey.description: A key or name corresponding to an icon from the Lucide React library, used for UI representation.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: Represents a user-created project. Documents in this collection are automatically deleted by the system 30 days after creation using a TTL policy on the 'createdAt' field.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Project entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this project.

featureId.description: Reference to the Feature used for this project.

name.description: The name given to the project.

description.description: An optional description provided by the user.

outputUrl.description: URL to the generated output file.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp used for the 30-day TTL policy. Ensure TTL is enabled in Cloud Console for this field.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. Only the user and admins can access.
Individual projects with 30-day TTL policy enforced on createdAt. Privacy is enforced via parent path.
